title: Senior Teacher - SRM University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - SRM University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
